title: Dynamite
description: A mod that adds dynamite to Minecraft.
body:
This mod, quite simply, adds Dynamite, which is a throwable object that explodes on impact.

![A screenshot of using the Dynamite Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w3Yjic6j/images/b640708ad3f0a7e3b36d67e47a8cc8076f633ea7.png)

Dynamite is crafted by using a Bamboo and a Gunpowder

![The crafting recipe for dynamite, which is a Bamboo and a Gunpowder placed anywhere on the crafting grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w3Yjic6j/images/8dbbc4261a95bf3b3c5d3950792df6d35fd8d6e7.png)

TNT is crafted through 9 Dynamite. There is no other way to craft TNT

![The crafting recipe for TNT, which is 3x3 grid of Dynamite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w3Yjic6j/images/e07f89ceb8bcb6beb66f0b6587810eb771a1bde5.png)

TNT can be crafted back into Dynamite

![Placing a TNT on the crafting grid returns 9 Dynamite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w3Yjic6j/images/a0e4409f0a87fb63cfcf4a446d8f71c991f44907.png)
